Offloaded page history

The edit history of some pages on shinto.miraheze.org has been offloaded to an external XML archive to reduce export load on the wiki farm. The on-wiki page still holds the most recent revision; everything prior lives in the archive.

What this page will eventually do

Fetch the offloaded XML, render a human-readable revision log, diff any two revisions, and offer a one-click download of the full history XML. Not built yet — for now it just points you at the raw archive file.

Archive repo: EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-xml-archives. Source: EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts.
